member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for converting DTOs to domain types. Located in Ui.Shared since it needs references to both Contracts and core domain types.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions.ToDomain(Meridian.Contracts.Configuration.AlpacaOptionsDto)
member.summary: Converts AlpacaOptionsDto to AlpacaOptions domain type.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions.ToDomain(Meridian.Contracts.Configuration.PolygonOptionsDto)
member.summary: Converts PolygonOptionsDto to PolygonOptions domain type.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions.ToDomain(Meridian.Contracts.Configuration.IBOptionsDto)
member.summary: Converts IBOptionsDto to IBOptions domain type.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions.ToDomain(Meridian.Contracts.Configuration.DerivativesConfigDto)
member.summary: Converts DerivativesConfigDto to DerivativesConfig domain type.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.DtoExtensions.ToDomain(Meridian.Contracts.Configuration.IndexOptionsConfigDto)
member.summary: Converts IndexOptionsConfigDto to IndexOptionsConfig domain type.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.AdminEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering admin and maintenance API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.AnalyticsEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering analytics API endpoints. Provides gap analysis, anomaly detection, latency stats, completeness, and throughput.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ApiKeyMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that enforces API key authentication on /api/* endpoints. The API key is read from the MDC_API_KEY environment variable and supports key rotation (re-reads the variable on each request). When no key is configured, requests pass through so other auth layers can decide access. Health check endpoints (/healthz, /readyz, /livez) are always exempt.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ApiKeyMiddleware.CryptographicEquals(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing attacks on API key validation. Uses CryptographicOperations.FixedTimeEquals which handles differing lengths without leaking length information through timing.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ApiKeyRateLimitMiddleware
member.summary: Per-API-key rate limiting middleware. Tracks request counts per API key using a sliding window and returns 429 when exceeded.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ApiKeyMiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the API key middleware.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ApiKeyMiddlewareExtensions.UseApiKeyAuthentication(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds API key authentication middleware for /api/* endpoints. The key is read from the MDC_API_KEY environment variable. When no key is set, requests pass through so other authentication layers can decide access. Health check endpoints (/healthz, /readyz, /livez) are always exempt.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.AuthEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering login/logout authentication endpoints.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.AuthEndpoints.MapAuthEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary:
Maps the login page, login API, logout API, and current-user info endpoints.
GET /login – returns the login page HTML.
POST /api/auth/login – validates credentials, sets a session cookie.
POST /api/auth/logout – invalidates the session cookie.
GET /api/auth/me – returns the current user's username, role, and permissions.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.AuthEndpoints.ResolveCurrentProfile(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService)
member.summary: Resolves the for the current request by first checking the session cookie and falling back to values placed in by the middleware. Returns when the request is unauthenticated.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginRequest
member.summary: Login request body for JSON clients.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Login request body for JSON clients.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.BackfillEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering backfill-related API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.BackfillEndpoints.MapBackfillEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all backfill API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.BackfillScheduleEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering backfill schedule, execution, and utility API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CalendarEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering trading calendar API endpoints. Provides market status, holidays, and trading day information.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CanonicalizationEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering canonicalization parity dashboard endpoints. Provides Phase 2 validation metrics: match rates, unresolved counts, and per-provider breakdowns.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CatalogEndpoints
member.summary: Endpoints for the Data Catalog — unified search and discovery over stored market data. Supports natural-language and structured queries, timeline coverage, and symbol summaries.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CheckpointEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering backfill checkpoint/resume API endpoints. Exposes checkpoint semantics to users for job resumability and crash recovery (P0).

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CheckpointEndpoints.MapCheckpointEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all checkpoint and ingestion job API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ConfigEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering configuration API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ConfigEndpoints.MapConfigEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all configuration-related API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CredentialEndpoints
F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CredentialEndpoints.KnownProviders
member.summary: Well-known provider → required env-var mapping used by all credential endpoints. Keeping this local avoids a dependency on Meridian.Ui.Services from this project.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CredentialEndpoints.MapCredentialEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Registers all credential management routes.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CronEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering cron expression validation API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.DiagnosticsEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering diagnostics API endpoints. Provides dry-run, provider testing, configuration validation, and diagnostic bundles.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers
member.summary: Shared helpers to reduce boilerplate in endpoint handlers. Provides consistent null-check, try/catch, and JSON response patterns. Uses FriendlyErrorFormatter for user-friendly error responses.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.HandleSync``1(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Object},System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Handles a synchronous endpoint handler with service null-check and error handling.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.HandleAsync``1(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}},System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Handles an async endpoint handler with service null-check and error handling.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.HandleAsync``1(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Object}},System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles an async endpoint with a cancellation token.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.ParseDateOrToday(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a date string or returns today's date.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.FormatErrorResult(System.Exception,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Formats an exception into a structured JSON error response using FriendlyErrorFormatter. Returns a consistent error envelope with error code, message, and actionable suggestion.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.EndpointHelpers.GetHttpStatusCode(System.Exception)
member.summary: Maps exception types to appropriate HTTP status codes.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionEndpoints
member.summary: REST endpoints for the paper-trading cockpit and execution dashboard. Exposes positions, orders, portfolio state, and gateway controls.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionAccountSnapshot
member.summary: Account-level snapshot returned by the execution cockpit.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionAccountSnapshot.#ctor(System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Int32,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Account-level snapshot returned by the execution cockpit.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionPortfolioSnapshot
member.summary: Full portfolio snapshot including all positions.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionPortfolioSnapshot.#ctor(System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Meridian.Execution.Models.ExecutionPosition},System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Full portfolio snapshot including all positions.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionGatewayHealth
member.summary: Gateway health summary.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExecutionGatewayHealth.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gateway health summary.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CircuitBreakerCommandRequest
member.summary: Request to open or close the execution circuit breaker.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CircuitBreakerCommandRequest.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Request to open or close the execution circuit breaker.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PositionLimitCommandRequest
member.summary: Request to update a default or symbol-specific position limit.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PositionLimitCommandRequest.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Decimal},System.String)
member.summary: Request to update a default or symbol-specific position limit.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ManualOverrideCommandRequest
member.summary: Request to create a manual execution override.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ManualOverrideCommandRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTimeOffset})
member.summary: Request to create a manual execution override.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ClearManualOverrideCommandRequest
member.summary: Request to clear an existing manual override.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ClearManualOverrideCommandRequest.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Request to clear an existing manual override.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CreatePaperSessionRequest
member.summary: Request to create a new paper trading session.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CreatePaperSessionRequest.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Request to create a new paper trading session.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.TradingActionResult
member.summary: Structured result returned by every Trading write action (cancel, close, pause, etc.). Carries a correlation ID so UI and backend audit logs can be cross-referenced.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.TradingActionResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Structured result returned by every Trading write action (cancel, close, pause, etc.). Carries a correlation ID so UI and backend audit logs can be cross-referenced.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExportEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering data export API endpoints. Wired to the real AnalysisExportService for actual data export.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ExportEndpoints.CleanupOldExportDirectories
member.summary: Removes export directories older than to prevent unbounded disk usage.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.FailoverEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering failover-related API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.
member.remarks: When a is registered in DI, endpoints return live runtime data (real failover state, actual health metrics). Otherwise, they fall back to configuration-only responses.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.FailoverEndpoints.MapFailoverEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all failover API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.HealthEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering system health API endpoints. Provides deep health checks for providers, storage, events, and diagnostics.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.HistoricalEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering historical data query API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.HistoricalEndpoints.MapHistoricalEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all historical data query API endpoints.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.HistoricalEndpoints.MapAlignmentEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps the /api/alignment endpoints for time series alignment operations.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.IBEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Interactive Brokers-specific API endpoints. Exposes IB connection status, error code reference, and API limit documentation.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.IBEndpoints.MapIBEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all Interactive Brokers-specific API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.IngestionJobEndpoints
member.summary: Maps REST API endpoints for the unified ingestion job contract. Exposes job creation, state transitions, checkpoint management, and queries.
member.remarks: Addresses P0: "No unified job contract across realtime/backfill flows" and P0: "Limited checkpoint semantics exposed to users".

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.IngestionJobEndpoints.MapIngestionJobEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,Meridian.Application.Pipeline.IngestionJobService,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all ingestion job API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.CreateIngestionJobRequest
member.summary: Request body for creating a new ingestion job.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.IngestionJobTransitionRequest
member.summary: Request body for transitioning a job state.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LeanEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering QuantConnect Lean integration API endpoints. Provides actual LEAN_PATH detection, algorithm scanning, and data sync capabilities.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LiveDataEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering live data API endpoints. Provides access to collected real-time market data (trades, quotes, order book, order flow).

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LiveDataEndpoints.MapLiveDataEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all live data API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddleware
member.summary:
Middleware that enforces session-based authentication.
Health probes (/healthz, /readyz, /livez) are always exempt.
The login page (/login) and auth API endpoints (/api/auth/*) are exempt when authentication is configured.
Unauthenticated API requests receive a 401 JSON response.
Unauthenticated browser (non-/api) requests are redirected to /login.
Authentication is optional in Development/Test and required elsewhere by default.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddleware.SessionCookieName
member.summary: Name of the HTTP-only session cookie set after successful login.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddleware.CurrentUserKey
member.summary: Key for the authenticated username stored in . Set by the middleware after successful session validation.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddleware.CurrentUserRoleKey
member.summary: Key for the authenticated user's stored in .

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddleware.CurrentUserPermissionsKey
member.summary: Key for the authenticated user's flags stored in .

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddlewareExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the login session middleware.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.LoginSessionMiddlewareExtensions.UseLoginSessionAuthentication(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Adds session-based authentication middleware. Authentication is optional in Development/Test and required elsewhere by default.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.MaintenanceScheduleEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering maintenance schedule CRUD API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.MessagingEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering messaging and notification API endpoints. Wired to the actual DailySummaryWebhook and ConnectionStatusWebhook services.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.MoneyMarketFundEndpoints
member.summary: Minimal API endpoint group for money market fund reference data, liquidity projections, sweep profiles, fund-family views, and rebuild orchestration.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.OptionsEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering equity options API endpoints. Provides access to option chains, quotes, greeks, trades, and open interest.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.OptionsEndpoints.MapOptionsEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all options / derivatives API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PathValidation
member.summary: Utility methods for validating and sanitizing file system paths in API inputs. Prevents path traversal attacks (e.g., ../../etc/passwd).

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PathValidation.IsWithinBase(System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Validates that a resolved path stays within the expected base directory.
member.param: The user-provided path or directory string.
The base directory that the resolved path must stay within.
The resolved full path if validation passes.
member.returns: True if the path is safe; false if it escapes the allowed base.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PathValidation.ContainsTraversal(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a path contains path traversal sequences.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PathValidation.SanitizeDataRoot(System.String)
member.summary: Sanitizes a data root path, ensuring it's a relative path without traversal. Returns null if the path is invalid.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.PromotionEndpoints
member.summary: REST endpoints for the Backtest → Paper → Live promotion workflow. Enables operators to evaluate, approve, or reject strategy promotions through the web dashboard.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ProviderEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering provider-related API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ProviderEndpoints.MapProviderEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all provider and data source API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ProviderExtendedEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering extended provider API endpoints (failover, rate limits, capabilities, switching).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ReplayEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering event replay API endpoints. Integrates with JsonlReplayer for actual JSONL event reading and replay.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ReplayEndpoints.ReplaySession.StartEventCounting
member.summary: Starts a background task to count events in the file using JsonlReplayer. Uses an async method directly instead of Task.Run to avoid wasting thread pool threads on I/O-bound work.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.ResilienceEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering resilience, cost estimation, and compliance endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SamplingEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering data sampling API endpoints. Reads actual JSONL data files from storage for sampling operations.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SecurityMasterEndpoints
member.summary: Endpoints for Security Master command/query workflows.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StatusEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering status and health API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts. Uses StatusEndpointHandlers for the actual response generation.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StatusEndpoints.MapStatusEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,Meridian.Application.UI.StatusEndpointHandlers,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all status and health API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StorageEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering storage operation API endpoints. Implements Phase 3B.2 — replaces 19 stub endpoints with working handlers.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StorageQualityEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering storage quality API endpoints. Implements Phase 3B.3 — replaces 9 stub endpoints with working handlers.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StorageQualityEndpoints.MapQualityDropsEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,Meridian.Application.Pipeline.DroppedEventAuditTrail,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps the /api/quality/drops endpoints exposing dropped event statistics from the pipeline's audit trail.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StrategyLifecycleEndpoints
member.summary: REST endpoints for querying and controlling the lifecycle of registered live strategies. Exposes pause, stop, and status operations. Strategy start is handled separately via the execution cockpit once an execution context is established.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StrategyStatusDto
member.summary: Snapshot of a strategy's current lifecycle state.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StrategyStatusDto.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Snapshot of a strategy's current lifecycle state.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StrategyActionResult
member.summary: Result of a lifecycle control action (pause/stop).

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.StrategyActionResult.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Result of a lifecycle control action (pause/stop).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SubscriptionEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering subscription management API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SymbolEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering symbol management API endpoints. Implements Phase 3B.1 — replaces 15 stub endpoints with working handlers.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SymbolEndpoints.MapIndexEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps the /api/indices endpoints for index constituent data.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SymbolMappingEndpoints
member.summary: Extension methods for registering symbol mapping API endpoints. Shared between web dashboard and desktop application hosts.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.SymbolMappingEndpoints.MapSymbolMappingEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all symbol mapping API endpoints.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints
member.summary: Master extension methods for registering all UI API endpoints. Provides a single entry point for mapping all shared endpoints. Uses ServiceCompositionRoot for centralized service registration.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.BuildUiHost(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the application with all UI services and endpoints. This is the single entry point for setting up the UI host and should be used instead of calling AddUiSharedServices and MapAllUiEndpoints separately.
member.param: The web application builder.
Optional path to configuration file.
member.returns: A configured WebApplication ready to run.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.BuildUiHost(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplicationBuilder,Meridian.Application.UI.StatusEndpointHandlers,System.String)
member.summary: Configures the application with UI services, endpoints, and shared status handlers. This overload allows sharing StatusEndpointHandlers with StatusHttpServer.
member.param: The web application builder.
Pre-configured status endpoint handlers to share.
Optional path to configuration file.
member.returns: A configured WebApplication ready to run.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.AddUiSharedServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Registers all shared services required by UI endpoints using the centralized composition root. Replaces the core BackfillCoordinator with the UI-extended version that includes preview functionality.
member.param: The service collection.
Optional path to configuration file.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.AddUiSharedServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Meridian.Application.UI.StatusEndpointHandlers,System.String)
member.summary: Registers shared services with a pre-configured StatusEndpointHandlers instance. Use this when you want to share the same handlers with StatusHttpServer.
member.param: The service collection.
Status endpoint handlers to register.
Optional path to configuration file.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.RegisterStrategyWorkstationServices(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers the strategy read-model services used by workstation bootstrap endpoints. These are registered with TryAdd so richer implementations can override them later.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MapUiEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Maps all UI API endpoints using default JSON serializer options.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MapUiEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions,System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions)
member.summary: Maps all UI API endpoints with custom JSON serializer options.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MapUiEndpointsWithStatus(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication,Meridian.Application.UI.StatusEndpointHandlers)
member.summary: Maps all UI API endpoints including status endpoints. Use this when StatusEndpointHandlers has been registered in DI.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MapDashboard(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Maps the dashboard HTML endpoint at the root path.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MapAllUiEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.WebApplication)
member.summary: Maps all UI endpoints including the dashboard. Convenience method that combines MapUiEndpoints and MapDashboard.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.MutationRateLimitPolicy
member.summary: Rate limiting policy name applied to mutation (POST/PUT/DELETE) endpoints.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.UiEndpoints.AddMutationRateLimiter(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a per-IP fixed-window rate limiter for mutation endpoints. Allows 10 requests per minute per IP with a small queue for bursts. Set the MDC_DISABLE_RATE_LIMIT=true environment variable to bypass rate limiting entirely (intended for test environments where all requests share the same loopback address and a 10/min limit would be exhausted immediately).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.WorkstationEndpoints
member.summary: Endpoints for the React workstation shell and its bootstrap placeholder data.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.WorkstationEndpoints.DeriveSubType(System.String)
member.summary: Derives the most specific sub-type available from the asset-class string without requiring a full aggregate rebuild. Returns null for asset classes that may map to multiple sub-types.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.RunComparisonRequest
member.summary: Request to compare multiple strategy runs side by side.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.RunComparisonRequest.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Request to compare multiple strategy runs side by side.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Endpoints.RunDiffRequest
member.summary: Request to diff two strategy runs.

member.summary: Request to diff two strategy runs.

Result of a run-vs-run diff showing position, parameter, and metric changes.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.HtmlTemplateGenerator
member.summary: Generates HTML templates for the web dashboard. CSS styles are in HtmlTemplateGenerator.Styles.cs, JavaScript in HtmlTemplateGenerator.Scripts.cs.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.HtmlTemplateGenerator.Login(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates the login page HTML. Reuses the same dark terminal theme as the main dashboard.
member.param: URL to redirect to after a successful login.
When true, an invalid-credentials message is displayed.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.HtmlTemplateGenerator.GetScripts
member.summary: Returns the dashboard JavaScript.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.HtmlTemplateGenerator.GetStyles
member.summary: Returns the dashboard CSS styles.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService
member.summary: Background service that continuously exports collected market data to a Lean-compatible directory layout. Runs on a configurable interval and converts JSONL files found under the Meridian data root into the Lean zip-CSV format expected by the QuantConnect Lean Engine.

remarks.para:
Configuration is driven by two environment variables:
LEAN_DATA_PATH — target directory where Lean data is written. If unset the service starts but does nothing until the path is supplied via .
LEAN_EXPORT_INTERVAL_SECONDS — export polling interval (default 300 s).
The service can also be reconfigured at runtime through and paused / resumed through .

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.Enabled
member.summary: Gets whether the auto-export is currently enabled.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.LeanDataPath
member.summary: Gets the configured target Lean data path, or null when not set.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.Interval
member.summary: Gets the polling interval between export runs.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.LastExportAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp of the last successful export run.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.LastExportError
member.summary: Gets the timestamp of the last export error, or null if never.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.LastErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the last error message, or null if no error occurred.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.TotalFilesExported
member.summary: Gets the total number of files exported since service start.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.TotalBytesExported
member.summary: Gets the total bytes written since service start.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.Configure(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Reconfigures the auto-export service at runtime.
member.param: Target Lean data directory. Pass null to keep existing value.
Whether the service should export on its next tick.
Export polling interval in seconds (minimum 10). Pass ≤0 to keep existing value.
Symbols to export. An empty collection means "all available symbols".

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.ExportFileToLeanZipAsync(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads a single Meridian JSONL file and writes a Lean-compatible zip containing a CSV entry. Returns the number of bytes written to the zip file, or 0 on failure.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanAutoExportService.ConvertJsonLineToLeanCsv(System.String,System.DateTime)
T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper
member.summary: Maps between Meridian symbol format and QuantConnect Lean's SecurityIdentifier format. Meridian symbols are plain tickers like "SPY" or "AAPL"; Lean uses qualified identifiers that encode market, security type, and an exchange-specific sid component.
member.remarks: Lean equity data paths follow the pattern: data/{securityType}/{market}/{resolution}/{ticker}/{yyyyMMdd}_{eventType}.zip This class converts Meridian tickers to the path components Lean expects and vice-versa.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.UsaMarket
member.summary: Lean market code for US equities.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.EquitySecurityType
member.summary: Lean security type folder for equities.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.CryptoSecurityType
member.summary: Lean security type folder for crypto.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.ForexSecurityType
member.summary: Lean security type folder for forex.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.ToLeanTicker(System.String)
member.summary: Converts an Meridian ticker symbol to a lowercase Lean ticker (used in data paths). Lean expects lower-case tickers in file/directory names.
member.param: Meridian symbol such as "SPY" or "AAPL".

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.FromLeanTicker(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a Lean lower-case ticker back to an Meridian upper-case symbol.
member.param: Lean ticker such as "spy".

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.DetectSecurityType(System.String)
member.summary: Detects the Lean security type folder name for the given Meridian symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.DetectMarket(System.String)
member.summary: Detects the Lean market for the given symbol.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.BuildLeanDataDirectory(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the Lean data directory path for a symbol, resolution, and data type. Path pattern: {baseDir}/{securityType}/{market}/{resolution}/{ticker}

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.BuildLeanFileName(System.DateTime,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the Lean zip file name for a given date and event type. Lean names trade files "{yyyyMMdd}_trade.zip" and quote files "{yyyyMMdd}_quote.zip".

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.MapEventTypeToLean(System.String)
member.summary: Maps an Meridian event type name to the Lean data type name used in file names.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LeanSymbolMapper.MapResolutionToMdc(System.String)
member.summary: Maps a Lean resolution string to an Meridian-friendly description.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService
member.summary: In-memory session store for username/password authentication with role-based access control. User accounts are resolved via which supports both the legacy single-user environment variable pattern (MDC_USERNAME / MDC_PASSWORD) and the multi-user pattern (MDC_USERS JSON array). Authentication defaults to optional in Development/Test and required elsewhere. Use MDC_AUTH_MODE=optional|required|auto to override the default environment-based mode.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment,Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfileRegistry)
member.summary: In-memory session store for username/password authentication with role-based access control. User accounts are resolved via which supports both the legacy single-user environment variable pattern (MDC_USERNAME / MDC_PASSWORD) and the multi-user pattern (MDC_USERS JSON array). Authentication defaults to optional in Development/Test and required elsewhere. Use MDC_AUTH_MODE=optional|required|auto to override the default environment-based mode.

member.name: F:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.SessionDuration
member.summary: Session lifetime; exposed so the auth endpoint can set a matching cookie expiry.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.IsConfigured
member.summary: Returns when at least one user account is configured.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.CreateSession(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates the supplied credentials and creates a new session token on success. Returns when the credentials are invalid or no accounts are configured.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.ValidateSession(System.String)
member.summary: Returns when the token corresponds to a valid, non-expired session.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.GetSessionProfile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the for the given session token, or when the token is missing or expired.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.LoginSessionService.RemoveSession(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the session associated with the given token (logout).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext
member.summary: Source-generated for concrete Direct Lending request/response types used in HTTP endpoint deserialization.
member.remarks:
Per ADR-014, all JSON serialization must use source-generated contexts to avoid reflection-based calls at hot paths.
Limitation — open-generic types: is an open generic record. The .NET source generator cannot emit type metadata for open-generic types because the closed form is not known at compile time. The TryBindCommand<TCommand> helper in therefore retains the reflection-based JsonSerializer.Deserialize<T>(string, JsonSerializerOptions) overload for those code paths. This is an accepted, documented deviation from ADR-014.
All other deserialization calls in DirectLendingEndpoints use this context directly.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.RequestProjectionRunRequest
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.ResolveReconciliationExceptionRequest
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.DateOnly
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.NullableDateOnly
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Serialization.DirectLendingJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.summary: Result of a backfill preview operation.

member.summary: Preview information for a single symbol.

member.summary: Information about existing data for a symbol.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator
member.summary: Extends the core BackfillCoordinator with preview functionality for UI applications. Wraps the core implementation and adds preview-specific methods.

remarks.para: Migration Note: This class wraps the core implementation from to add preview functionality while delegating core operations to the wrapped instance.
Provider Discovery: Uses for unified provider discovery. If a registry is provided, backfill providers are discovered via .

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.#ctor(Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.ConfigStore,Meridian.Infrastructure.Adapters.Core.ProviderRegistry,Meridian.Infrastructure.Adapters.Core.ProviderFactory)
member.summary: Creates a BackfillCoordinator with unified provider registry support.
member.param: Configuration store.
Optional provider registry for unified provider discovery.
Optional provider factory for creating providers if registry is empty.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.DescribeProviders
member.summary: Gets descriptions of all available backfill providers.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.TryReadLast
member.summary: Tries to read the last backfill result.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.TryReadSymbolCheckpoints
member.summary: Returns the per-symbol checkpoint map, or null when no checkpoints exist.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.TryReadSymbolBarCounts
member.summary: Returns the per-symbol bar-count sidecar, or null when no bar-count data exists.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.RunAsync(Meridian.Application.Backfill.BackfillRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a backfill operation for the specified request.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.CheckProviderHealthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets health status of all providers.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.ResolveSymbolAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolve a symbol using OpenFIGI.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.GetProgress
member.summary: Gets backfill progress snapshot from the core coordinator, if available.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.PreviewAsync(Meridian.Application.Backfill.BackfillRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Previews a backfill operation without actually fetching data. Returns information about what would be backfilled.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.GetProviderNotes(Meridian.Infrastructure.Adapters.Core.IHistoricalDataProvider)
member.summary: Gets provider notes from the centralized ProviderCatalog. Eliminates per-provider conditionals in favor of standardized catalog lookup.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.CreateService
member.summary: Creates the backfill service using providers from ProviderRegistry. Falls back to ProviderFactory or manual instantiation if registry is empty.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.BackfillCoordinator.GetProviders
member.summary: Gets backfill providers using a priority-based discovery approach: 1. ProviderRegistry.GetBackfillProviders() - unified registry 2. ProviderFactory.CreateBackfillProviders() - factory with credential resolution 3. Manual instantiation - backwards compatibility fallback

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.ConfigStore
member.summary: ConfigStore for web dashboard hosting. Delegates all operations to the core and only provides a web-specific default config path (4 directories up from BaseDirectory).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.ConfigStoreExtensions
member.summary: Configures the core ConfigStore default path resolver for web dashboard hosting.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.SecurityMasterSecurityReferenceLookup
member.summary: Adapts Security Master query services to workstation-facing symbol enrichment.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.Services.SecurityMasterSecurityReferenceLookup.DeriveSubType(System.String)
member.summary: Derives the most likely sub-type from the asset class string without requiring a full aggregate rebuild. Returns null for asset classes that do not have a unique sub-type (e.g. Equity, which can be CommonShare, Adr, or ReitShare).

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.StaticAssetPathResolver
member.summary: Resolves the static asset root for hosts that may be launched from the repository root, the project directory, or the compiled output directory.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfileRegistry
member.summary:
Manages the set of user accounts available for authentication.
User accounts are sourced from environment variables using one of two approaches:
Multi-user (recommended): Set MDC_USERS to a JSON array of objects, e.g.:
MDC_USERS=[{"username":"alice","password":"s3cr3t","role":"TradeDesk"}, {"username":"bob","password":"p@ss","role":"Accounting"}]
Single-user legacy (backward-compatible): Set MDC_USERNAME and MDC_PASSWORD. These are mapped to a single account.
When both are set, MDC_USERS takes precedence.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfileRegistry.IsConfigured
member.summary: Returns when at least one user account is configured.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfileRegistry.Authenticate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validates and against the configured user accounts.
member.returns: The for the matching account, or when the credentials are invalid or no accounts are configured.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfileRegistry.CryptographicEquals(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing attacks.

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfile
member.summary: Represents an authenticated user's identity and role within a session.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfile.#ctor(System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Auth.UserRole)
member.summary: Represents an authenticated user's identity and role within a session.

member.name: P:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserProfile.Permissions
member.summary: The permissions granted to this user based on their .

member.name: T:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserAccountConfig
member.summary: Configuration shape for a single user account loaded from the MDC_USERS environment variable.

member.name: M:Meridian.Ui.Shared.UserAccountConfig.#ctor(System.String,System.String,Meridian.Contracts.Auth.UserRole)
member.summary: Configuration shape for a single user account loaded from the MDC_USERS environment variable.
